theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Futuristic/Premium Glassmorphism
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Premium, futuristic, AI-enhanced, soft, trustworthy, editorial, luxury SaaS feel

rules: No harsh black (#000000), use deep green-tinted darks like #0A2518.
Use #EEFBF3 for main sections and alternating backgrounds.
Use #D4F5E2 with backdrop-blur-xl and low opacity for glass elements.
Accent Green #34C472 strictly for CTAs, active states, and AI glowing indicators.
Instrument Serif MUST be used for all primary headings to give the editorial, luxury feel.
Outfit is for body text, data points, and UI components.
Do NOT use 'font-bold' on Instrument Serif, use font-normal or italic for elegance.

layout_and_spacing.marketing_pages: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for asymmetrical layouts. Avoid Shadcn containers. Use massive padding (py-24 or py-32).
layout_and_spacing.dashboards: Control Room Grid. gap-4 or gap-6. Keep it clean and readable.

animations: Floating elements: Slow translateY animations for 3D widgets (e.g., calendar, medical cross).
Hover effects on glass cards: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), increase blur and shadow.
AI Elements: Pulse/Glow effects using shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(52,196,114,0.5)].

strategy.marketing: Custom HTML/Tailwind for bento grids and asymmetric layouts. Use pure CSS or framer-motion for animations.
strategy.dashboard: Shadcn UI (Customized). Use flat, rectangular, dense styles.
strategy.buttons: Rounded-full for CTAs (pill shape). Glassy buttons for secondary actions.

specific_components.header: Crystal Glass sticky nav (z-50). backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, subtle bottom border.
specific_components.cards: Glassmorphism for Patient/Doctor dashboards. Subtle border radius (rounded-2xl).
specific_components.inputs: Shadcn inputs but customized with soft green focus rings (focus:ring-[#34C472]).

hero_backgrounds.description: 3D frosted glass medical cross with floating bubbles, premium.
hero_backgrounds.usage: Use as the main hero graphic on the landing page (right side or overlapping).

ai_elements.description: Abstract AI health sphere glowing in mint.
ai_elements.usage: Use in the AI Assistant chat interface or AI teaser section.

widgets.usage: Use in the 'Booking / Availability' feature showcase.

people.usage: Use in Doctor Search & Profile pages.
Use in Doctor Search & Profile pages.
Use in 'Why Choose Us' or 'Patient Dashboard' welcome areas.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind font family: sans: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif'], serif: ['Instrument Serif', 'serif'].
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide icons for medical symbols. Keep stroke width thin (1.5) for elegance.
Data-testid is MANDATORY for all interactive elements.
Never use solid black text. Use #0A2518 for contrast.
For the Landing Page hero, combine the 3D medical cross graphic with floating glass cards showing mock metrics. Overlap them slightly for depth.
For Auth Pages, use a 2-column layout. Left side: Glassy login form on a soft mint background. Right side: Full-height image (consultation_1) with a soft green overlay.
Patient and Doctor Dashboards should use a sidebar navigation. The main content area should have a #EEFBF3 background, with widgets as white glass cards (backdrop-blur).
Booking Flow: Implement a clean Calendly-style UI. Do NOT use default HTML date inputs. Build a custom grid of available slots using Shadcn buttons.
AI Health Assistant: Design a floating chat bubble in the bottom right. When opened, it should look like a frosted glass window with soft mint gradients.
Add tailwind animation for floating elements: 'animate-bounce' is too fast, create a custom 'animate-float' keyframe (transform translateY(-10px) over 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate).
